claim_boundary: I5-A strengthens I5 as a second source-current medium-surface trace mechanism. It does not replace I5, widen M1 into M2, or support minimal shared-medium participation.
mechanism_distinction_from_i5: I5 consumes the N28 I4-A single-shell strengthening source. I5-A consumes the N28 I4-A2 split-shell / delayed-boundary mechanism source.
source_mechanism_note: I4-A strengthens I4 by margin in a beta local shell; I4-A2 tests a distinct split-shell/delayed-boundary mechanism.
strengthening_kind: mechanism_diversity_and_repeatability; I5-A shows that M1 surface-trace evidence is not confined to the I5 single-shell strengthening mechanism
